title: Doctave Site
description: A documentation site managed on the Doctave docs-as-code platform, representing a collection of pages, configuration, and deployment settings.

id.description: Unique identifier for the documentation site.

name.description: Display name of the documentation site.

description.description: A brief description of the documentation site.

customDomain.description: Custom domain configured for the site.

repository.description: Source repository URL for the documentation content.

branch.description: Git branch used for building the site.

visibility.description: Whether the site is publicly accessible or private.

navigation.description: Ordered list of navigation items defining the site structure.

theme.description: Theme and branding configuration for the site.

primaryColor.description: Primary brand color in hex format.

logo.description: URL to the site logo image.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the site was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the site was last updated.

NavigationItem.description: A navigation entry representing a page or section in the site hierarchy.

title.description: Display title of the navigation item.

path.description: URL path for the navigation item.
